text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe the academy's letting you skip several grades and
enroll... They must have seen your potential. Oh, my heart's still
racing.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text:
Your mother and I will always be there to cheer you on. If there's
anything we can do for you, just say the word!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Thanks, Mom and Dad. And thanks, Tracen Academy, for believing
in me. I won't let you down.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm going to make my dream come true here!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Phew! Another splendid run if I do say so myself! This is how a model student carries herself! And yet, I feel like I could still do better...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hmph! You there!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: M-me?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What do you say to working up a good sweat with yours truly?! Let us
run together, my fellow Tracen Academy comrade!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Uh, you want to run... with me? O-of course! I'd be happy to!
My, you look like you're having fun.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Quite a lovely morning, isn't it? I'd like to join you on your run, if you
don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
A good morning indeed! Oho, so you wish to race? Excellent! I'm
always ready for a challenge!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'd love to! R-race with both of you, I mean!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I imagine the scent of flowers will carry on the breeze today. Hehe.
What a wonderful way to enjoy a race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ha ha ha! This is but a mere warm-up! Here gooooes!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm afraid it will take more than that to outrun this burst of
wind.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I can't keep up. It hurts... to breathe. The sound of their cleats is
growing fainter with each step.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Why... can't I... Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(The two figures crossing the finish line looked so tiny, I could barely
see them.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hmm, that was well played on my part! While the race was close toward the end, my victory was sheer perfection! You two put on a splendid show too, of course!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Oh? I was sure I reached the goal first. Hmm... I suppose without
anyone here to judge, it's hard to say.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oho! If a decisive call is what you desire, then why don't we race again? And this time, I'll make sure there'll be zero doubts about the winner!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. When petals dance on the breeze, they sometimes obscure
one's view. I suppose, then, I have no choice but to become a gale.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(They ran so fast, and yet they've both recovered already. We're on
completely different levels...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(After that, I started noticing how different I was from the others.
Everyone was bigger, stronger, and so much more experienced than
me. How can I even begin to compete?)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I get it now. The academy might have seen my potential, but... I'm just
a child. That means... I have to work even harder.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(When I look up, I see cherry blossoms, blooming proudly in the big
blue sky. But... that's not me yet.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I make my way to the training track once again in search of a
promising trainee. Scanning the grounds, I spot someone by
themselves in a quiet corner.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew. Hm... I think I'm missing something. When Bakushin O sped up, she was more...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're... the trainer I helped the other day, right? My name's
Nishino Flower. Are you feeling better?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thank Nishino Flower for her help and bring up the question that
immediately comes to mind. It looks like she's training by herself,
but...
choice_data_list:
Why are you all the way back here in the
corner?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah... To tell the truth, I still have a lot to learn. And um... I don't want
to get in the way of anyone else's training.
choice_data_list: I don't think you'd get in the way...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I'm fine! I'm still starting out, but if I keep working hard, I'll
be able to catch up with everybody else!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It might be just one small step at a time, but I'm able to do a little
more with each passing day. Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Nishino Flower smiles. Then, with a bow, she returns to her training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She understands her limitations and is working hard to overcome
them. Her determination is awe-inspiring and pulls me out of my
gloom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I may not have a track record yet, but I can still study and better
myself—every little bit will help me be the best trainer I can be for
any future Umamusume I work with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I begin spending more time in the library, trying to absorb as
much knowledge as I can. One day, I see a familiar face.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello. Are you here to do some reading too?
Wooow, those are some really thick books...
choice_data_list: Just studying up on how to be a better trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But you're already a professional trainer, aren't you? That's amazing.
You must be working so hard!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thanks to me?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't Flower. What's up? You look like you're in a chipper
mood today.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Sky! Hehe, I am! Something really, reaaally good happened!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You don't say. That's why you seem more cheerful than usual, huh.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(That trainer said I gave them courage. Hehe... I guess I'll have to
work even harder!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Just... a few more reps! I think I can handle a little more weight...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: H-huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You okay, Flower?!
